text: To compare two things, you say: this one is faster than the old one.
Today you say it is the best of all: this is the fastest and the most reliable one.

Our product is the fastest on the market.
This device is the most reliable of all.
It is the cheapest option for our customers.
Our service is the best choice you can make.
Hello, David. I recommend this product. It is the best choice for the customer.
Good. Why is it the best option on the market?
It is the fastest and the most reliable one. That is our main advantage.
And is it popular? Are we the market leader?
Yes. It is the most popular brand, and the most valuable solution for the customer.
Perfect. Then this is the clear winner. We present it to the customer.
I recommend this product to you.
It is the fastest on the market.
It is the most reliable option of all.
Our company is the market leader.
It is the best choice and the clear winner.

Hi, this is David from Sanofi Medley. Next month, we are going to present our top product to a big customer. I want you to explain why it is the best choice on the market. Please tell them three things. First, it is the fastest device we have. Second, it is the most reliable one for a busy pharmacy. And third, it has the best price for the quality. Remember, the customer wants the best solution, not only a cheap one. Send me your three reasons by email before Monday. Thank you.

Hello, my name is Renata. Today I am going to tell you why our company is the market leader. We are the most popular brand for pharmacies in our region, and we have the most experienced team. Our main advantage is simple. We offer the best service and the most valuable solution for the customer. Many people say we are the safest choice and the easiest company to work with. If you want a strong partner, we are the best option on the market. That is why we are the number one choice.

First, Gleice says which product is the best choice. Then she gives the strongest reason, the most important advantage. After that, she compares it with the other options on the market. Next, she explains why it is the best solution for the customer. Finally, she recommends it and says it is the number one option.
